art_style.lighting: soft top-left ambient, no hard shadow crossing tile boundary

saturation_system.description: Each regular tile has 6 chapter color variants progressing through saturation restoration stages as the island heals

regular_tiles.name: 金枪鱼
regular_tiles.base_subject: golden bluefin tuna, side-profile slight upward tilt, warm golden-yellow scales, teal accent fins

regular_tiles.name: 章鱼
regular_tiles.base_subject: chibi octopus, round head, 8 rounded tentacles, pink-purple palette

regular_tiles.name: 海星
regular_tiles.base_subject: starfish, 5 rounded arms with small bumps, warm coral-orange

regular_tiles.name: 寄居蟹
regular_tiles.base_subject: hermit crab peeking from spiral shell, small round claws raised, sandy-tan shell, peach body

regular_tiles.name: 灯笼鱼
regular_tiles.base_subject: anglerfish/lanternfish, round dark body, glowing bioluminescent lure, deep teal with gold glow

regular_tiles.name: 河豚
regular_tiles.base_subject: pufferfish fully inflated, round spiky silhouette, yellow-cream body, short rounded spines

regular_tiles.name: 鲸鱼
regular_tiles.base_subject: blue whale, rounded streamlined body, water spout, gentle expression, ocean blue with teal highlights

regular_tiles.name: 珊瑚
regular_tiles.base_subject: branching coral, 3-5 upward branches rounded tips, coral orange-pink, small decorative dots

regular_tiles.name: 海螺
regular_tiles.base_subject: spiral conch shell, wide opening facing viewer, peach-cream tones, soft pink inner glow

regular_tiles.name: 贝壳
regular_tiles.base_subject: scallop shell, fan shape with ridged top edge, cream and lilac gradient

regular_tiles.name: 螃蟹
regular_tiles.base_subject: red crab, both claws raised joyfully, vivid red-coral watercolor, warm highlights

regular_tiles.name: 海龟
regular_tiles.base_subject: sea turtle, round patterned shell hexagonal plates, four flippers wide, green with sandy yellow shell

regular_tiles.name: 水母
regular_tiles.base_subject: jellyfish, round translucent dome, 4-6 trailing tendrils, lavender-pink with inner glow

regular_tiles.name: 飞鱼
regular_tiles.base_subject: flying fish mid-leap, elongated pectoral fins as wings, silvery-blue body, amber belly, water droplets below

regular_tiles.name: 海豚
regular_tiles.base_subject: dolphin leaping upward, rounded streamlined body, ocean-blue, white belly, friendly smile

regular_tiles.name: 海鸥
regular_tiles.base_subject: seagull in flight, wings spread in gentle arc, white body, soft grey wingtips, yellow beak

regular_tiles.name: 椰子树
regular_tiles.base_subject: coconut palm tree, slightly curved trunk, 4-5 palm fronds, 2-3 brown coconuts, tropical green, sandy trunk

regular_tiles.name: 灯塔
regular_tiles.base_subject: miniature lighthouse, white and red striped tower, rounded top lantern room, golden light glow, small waves at base

regular_tiles.name: 渔船
regular_tiles.base_subject: wooden fishing boat, rounded hull, small mast with furled sail, driftwood-brown wood, teal water ripples

regular_tiles.name: 浮标
regular_tiles.base_subject: maritime buoy, round ball with flat top, red and white horizontal stripes, anchor chain, small wave

special_blocks.name: 光波特殊块
special_blocks.mechanic: 清除整行/整列 (wave clear row or column)
special_blocks.visual_identity: teal-cyan cell with concentric ring ripple and warm white inner glow
special_blocks.distinguishing_feature: expanding concentric rings motif unique to this block

special_blocks.name: 光链特殊块
special_blocks.mechanic: 连锁相邻消除 (chain adjacent matches)
special_blocks.visual_identity: sakura-pink cell with gold chain link pattern and scan-line glow
special_blocks.distinguishing_feature: chain link motif with gold #F5C842 connecting lines

special_blocks.name: 穿透特殊块
special_blocks.mechanic: 穿透障碍物直线消除 (pierce through obstacles in a line)
special_blocks.visual_identity: orange cell with directional arrow and blue-white burst glow at tip
special_blocks.distinguishing_feature: single directional arrow — only block with explicit direction indicator

special_blocks.name: 置换特殊块
special_blocks.mechanic: 交换两格位置 (swap two tile positions)
special_blocks.visual_identity: golden-yellow cell with double circular arrows and green spiral accent
special_blocks.distinguishing_feature: bidirectional swap arrows — only block using #F5C842 golden base

special_blocks.name: 连锁特殊块
special_blocks.mechanic: 自动连锁触发序列 (auto-chain sequential trigger)
special_blocks.visual_identity: forest-green cell with sequential ripple rings and orange-red chain dots
special_blocks.distinguishing_feature: sequential numbered or step-dotted chain pattern — only dark green block

review_checklist.seam_check: 图块无缝拼接验证 — puzzle_grid single_tiles mode: no terrain seams required; check icon does not bleed outside 8px bleed zone
review_checklist.pattern_variants: 20种基础图案已定义 (20 base marine/island patterns); 每章6个饱和度变体 × 6章 = 完整章节色彩变换
review_checklist.atlas_size_check: 图块atlas尺寸符合规格 — tile_size_px=128 from art-pipeline-config.json.tileset; atlas_max_px=2048 confirmed; per-chapter atlas policy confirmed
review_checklist.special_block_identity: 特殊块视觉识别度 — 5种特殊块各有独特外观: 光波(teal同心圆), 光链(粉+金链), 穿透(橙+方向箭头), 置换(金+双向箭头), 连锁(绿+序列点)
review_checklist.combo_vfx_frames: combo触发特效帧 — 12帧frame animation per special block; idle breathing glow 2.0-2.8s; does not occlude board (transparent background tile boundary)

step_0_source_resolution.reason: All 25 tile assets use source_strategy=llm_image_generation (ai_generated). No existing asset pack search, license QA, or adaptation needed.

step_1_2d5d_spec.reason: dimension=2d per concept-contract.json. 2.5D production and lighting specs not required.

step_2_tileset_generation.limit_note: PNG image files require image generation API execution. All prompts, paths, and generation parameters fully specified.

asset_states.note: All 25 canonical_registry.tiles[] assets advanced from placeholder to spec_complete. Actual PNG generation (completing to 'generated' state) requires image API execution documented in tileset-generation-spec.json.
asset_states.completion_condition_met: tile-art-spec.json EXISTS and tile-art-review.html EXISTS and all 25 tiles have current_state != placeholder (state = spec_complete)
